title: nasturtium ceratophyllum
intro: Nasturtium ceratophyllum, also known as water wittich or river cress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of nasturtium ceratophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as skin conditions and respiratory issues.
